Video.summary: Nikki Boxlerĺs life in Update New York on her family farm raising cattle and producing maple syrup is a few thousand miles from the hills of New Mexico. Weĺll take a look into Nikkiĺs life back home and then follow along as she visits the small town of Quemado and its bustling population of 228, while she pursues bugling elk with her favorite Winchester in hand. Weĺll also head to Missouri and Texas to chase whitetails with Chris Keefer and Paul Sawyer.
Video.title: ôNew Mexico Magicö

Video.summary: Capt. Jared travels to Venice, Louisiana, where the Mississippi River meets the Gulf, joining Capt. Garrett George and Capt. Jesse Leboeuf for an action-packed offshore adventure in pursuit of Redfish and Tuna.
Video.title: "LA Tuna Pt 2"

Video.summary: Everyone knows Colorado for its epic mountains and fresh powder. But on this episode of DIRT, weĺre digging into the unexpected side of the state (UFO rumors and all). Whether surfing infinite river waves, cultivating perfect carrot seeds, or fly fishing in downtown Denverĺs shadowŚgeeky passions run high. Follow along as we gather ingredients for a farm to table final feast equal parts foraged, free-range, and free-thinking.
Video.title: DIRT - "Is Colorado a Food Utopia? Exploring Farm to Table Cuisine, Epic Landscapes & UFO's"

Image.alt: DIRT - "Is Colorado a Food Utopia? Exploring Farm to Table Cuisine, Epic Landscapes & UFO's"
DIRT - "Is Colorado a Food Utopia? Exploring Farm to Table Cuisine, Epic Landscapes & UFO's"
DIRT - "Is Colorado a Food Utopia? Exploring Farm to Table Cuisine, Epic Landscapes & UFO's"

Video.summary: Captains Scott and Steve start the season with Capt. Scott Stoky chasing Islamorada Tunas and Mahis offshore out of Plantation Boat Mart.
Video.title: "Islamorada Blackfins And Mahis With Capt Scott Stoky"

Image.alt: "Islamorada Blackfins And Mahis With Capt Scott Stoky"
"Islamorada Blackfins And Mahis With Capt Scott Stoky"
"Islamorada Blackfins And Mahis With Capt Scott Stoky"

Video.summary: Captains Scott and Steve catch a mixed bag bottom fishing off of Islamorada with Captain Scott Stoky.
Video.title: "Islamorada Mixed Bag"

Video.summary: Captains Scott and Steve go yellow tailing out of Hawks Cay for a limit of tasty yellowtail snapper and Steve picks a battle with a big lemon shark.
Video.title: "Yellowtails And Lemons At Hawks Cay"

Video.summary: Captains Scott and Steve bounce around the reefs out of Hawks Cay catching a wide variety of reef dwellers.
Video.title: "Reef Fishing Out Of Hawks Cay"

Video.summary: Captains Scott and Steve take their brand new Invincible 36ĺ out of Plantation Boat Mart to fly the kites for some early season sailfishing.
Video.title: "Sailfish Season"

Video.summary: Captains Scott and Steve make a big run from Plantation Boat Mart in the Invincible 36ĺ into the green Gulf waters to fill the Yeti cooler and battle with some seas monsters.
Video.title: "Into The Green"

Video.summary: With the local Key West ship wrecks covered in Permit, Rush takes good friend and marine artist KC Scott fishing for "inspiration." While permit is the plan, the boys stay rigged and ready for the numerous species the Florida Keys may deliver when fishing offshore.
Video.title: "Permit Sketch"

Video.summary: The most important fish catch is the one that got you hooked on fishing in the first place, and for many of us that catch happened early in life. On this episode Ali and Rush grab their favorite little fishing buddies for a great day on the water on their respective coasts. In Florida, Rush spends time with his son Kade fishing for huge permit while Ali takes his nephew Duke out for some wholesome yellowtail action in California.
Video.title: "Hooked Early"

Video.summary: CA heads to the space coast for a mixed bag of drum.
Video.title: "Drumroll Please"

Video.summary: CA fishes the ultra shallow ponds in Flagler beach for reds and snook.
Video.title: "The Pond"

Video.summary: Capt Justin & Meredithĺs beautiful Panama City Beach morning is met with a slack tide so a new path to redfish success is found under a popular bridge.
Video.title: "A Bridge Too Red"

Video.summary: If you had a blank check to build the best fishing boat possible, what would you create? Capt. Justin gets his wish, but it doesnĺt come quickly or easily.
Video.title: "Dream Boat Build"

Video.summary: Capt. Justin takes a fellow guide on his new boat to see how it measures up. Using only public waypoints on his Humminbird unit, they find exploring to be as much fun as it is fruitful.
Video.title: "Fishing the Dream Boat"

Video.summary: Capt. Justin heads offshore, dodges storms and shows how the "Return 'Em Right" program is saving fish that experience barotrauma.
Video.title: "Happy Returns"

Video.summary: On this episode of Huckberry Homes, we headed out to far west Texas to meet up with our friend and Home Builder Kyle Melgaard. Over the last 5 years, Kyle and his crew at Method Building Co. have created custom and lasting spaces that compliment the vast landscape of the West Texas desert. Kyle showed us a day in his life, taking us to an active job site that he calls an office, and showcasing his unique Rammed Earth style house that him and his family call home.
Video.title: "Inside This Home Builderĺs Desert Hideaway in Far West Texas"

Image.alt: "Inside This Home Builderĺs Desert Hideaway in Far West Texas"
"Inside This Home Builderĺs Desert Hideaway in Far West Texas"
"Inside This Home Builderĺs Desert Hideaway in Far West Texas"

Video.summary: We head back to the Mecca of Jumbo Perch at Lake Cascade, ID!
Video.title: "Cascade Gold"

Video.summary: Captain Jonathan Moss shares the skiff with the creator of D.O.A. Lures, Capt. Mark Nichols, in Stuart, Florida.
Video.title: ôMr. D.O.A.ö

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor head deep into the Everglades to target snook in the murky waters of Lake Ingraham.
Video.title: "Lake Ingraham Snook"

Video.summary: This episode is all about thanking our service men and women who have served or are still currently serving; Our pals Wes Thomas and Terry McWilliams join in to help thank these heroes, along with great companies like IN 811 and Centerpoint; special thanks to West Bogg Park for having us again this year.
Video.title: "Tribute to Heroes"

Video.summary: CA and Marlin head to the beautiful waters of Tarpon Springs for cobia and trout.
Video.title: "Cobia Co-Op"

Video.summary: Over a decade after the game changing Longbeard XR was introduced by Winchester, the wait is finally over for their next ground breaking turkey load. After years of perfecting the recipe behind the scenes, Winchester finally unveiled the new Longbeard TSS at a turkey camp in northern Michigan. First watch the jaw dropping Longbeard TSS pattern board testing, then see it go to work on some spring gobblers.
Video.title: "Longbeard Mitten Mayhem"

Video.summary: Nestled in the hills of Ohio just west of the Appalachians is a very special deer camp ripe with memories from deer seasonĺs past. With the development of the 350 Legend straight-walled cartridge by Winchester in 2019, a world of opportunities now existed in states like Ohio and Michigan. In this episode, with the 350 Legend in hand, three mature whitetails meet their maker, from the same blind, over the course of three seasons.
Video.title: "Remembering A Legend"

Video.summary: Itĺs been 60 years since AA was introduced to the shooting sports world. Since that day, an immeasurable number of AA hulls have hit the ground and countless shooters have stood center stage raising a trophy where millions of dollars have been won. Professional and recreational shooters alike have trusted AA for six decades. In this episode, load up for stories of high school, collegiate competitors and the worldĺs best as they bust clays with the legendary shot shell. - GUESTS: Zach Keenbaum (Team Winchester) Desi Edmunds (Team Winchester) Kayla Wilgus (Team Winchester) Amy Cawley (Team Winchester) Anthony Matarese (Team Winchester)
Video.title: "Six Decades Of Dominance"

Video.summary: For the first time in history, the World English Sporting Clays Championship was held in the United States at the incredible M&M Hunting Preserve owned by the Matarese family in New Jersey. Watch as Winchesterĺs best shooters vie for Gold as they compete against over 2,500 shooters and 17 countries. Weĺll also join the Kids and Clays foundation in Florida as they host an event that will most certainly touch your soul.
Video.title: "Clays With Purpose"

Video.summary: Everything is bigger in Texas, including the stories. With the whitetail rut in the midwest winding down, the Winchester Life Crew of Chris Keefer, Casey Keefer, Nikki Boxler and Paul Sawyer head south to the Texas Panhandle with Winchesters in hand hoping to wrangle in a few Texas-sized giants.
Video.title: ôLonestar Legendsö

Video.summary: The positive impact made by the shooting sports and recreational shooting to people across our country canĺt be measured in just one story, so we have three. In Florida, Olympian Dania Vizzi trains at her home shooting facility and talk about how she went from ballerina to one of the best shotgun shooters in the world. In Nebraska, firearms instructor Thea Van Syoc has used the disciplines of competitive pistol shooting and training to help shape her life. Finally weĺll take a look into the National African American Gun Association and learn how one day at the range for Phillip Smith created the fastest growing firearm organization in the United States.
Video.title: ôShooting is Lifeö

Video.summary: We set out to tell the tale of Marion - and his legendary Mackĺs Prairie Wings, smack dab in the middle of the world famous Stuttgart, Arkansas - the land of ducks and rice. Get an inside look at a man that many consider to be larger than life, from those that knew him best, like his cousin and fellow hell raiser, Bud McCollum. Weĺll even hear a story or two from Milton Stovesand, an 81 year old former waterfowl guide and Mackĺs employee who actually guided John Olin a time or two, and ran the timber holes with Marion. Itĺs timber holes and tall tales. Itĺs cups of coffee and cupped up wings. Itĺs partners in business, and partners in potholes and itĺs pure Arkansas...just like Marion.
Video.title: ôThe Legend of Stuttgartö

Video.summary: Famous for its Mayan ruins, the Yucatan in Mexico is home to a diverse array of wildlife. After years of over-harvesting and exploitation, regulated hunting is helping to conserve large areas of this fragile ecosystem. Dan Cabela travels to the region to find out more.
Video.title: "Into the Yucatßn"

Video.summary: South Africa offers an incredible insight into the hunter and gatherer history of ancestors. Dan Cabela re-traces the footsteps of humanity's forefathers and explores how modern, private ownership of land has helped re-balance the human relationship with nature.
Video.title: "The hunting heritage of South Africa"

Video.summary: Capt. Jared and Capt. Jake Leon hop in the bay boat in search of a - back country slam.
Video.title: "Bay Boat Slam"

Video.summary: Join the Raskob family on a summertime adventure in the Florida Keys.
Video.title: "Raskob Lifestyle"

Video.summary: Capt. Jared Raskob joins great friends Mitch Widom, Andy Yaffa, Chris Hamaway, and local Capt. Gonzalo Castillo for an epic day of Mahi fishing just offshore in Los Cabos, Mexico.
Video.title: "Cabo Mahi"

Video.summary: Capt. Jared Raskob joins Capt. Eric Reynolds & Jessica Ocasio on a sporty adventure offshore from Islamorada in search of Swordfish.
Video.title: "Swords"

Video.summary: A day of reef fishing in Islamorada turns into a Kingfish and Yellowtail frenzy for Captains Scott and Steve.
Video.title: "Silver And Gold"

Video.summary: It only takes 3 fish to fill the Yeti cooler when Capt. Scott fishes the top with kites for Wahoo and Steve pulls a big Mutton Snapper off the bottom.
Video.title: "Wahoos On Kites"

Video.summary: This week we join professional angler, Andrew Nordbye, for a cold day on Guntersville to catch some giant crappie; traveling through a major winter storm and arriving at an abandoned lake was the not-surprising scene for the day. Andrew's priorities are in order when it comes to his marriage, his faith, and his family, including just-arrived new babies...but he sill made time to squeeze in this day on water with us!
Video.title: "Alabama Artic Crappies"

Video.summary: Today, Capt. Danny has made a long drive up North, to Virginia Beach. Heĺs joining his buddy Capt. Travis for an afternoon of fishing for true giantsů
Video.title: "Virginia Beach Brawlers Pt 1"

Video.summary: Key Largo is famous for its vibrant coral reefs that teem with life. So, letĺs take a dive and explore this amazing underwater oasis that puts Key Largo on the map! This episode also explores the role of Coralpalooza in coral restoration Ś and an unexpected hero in seagrass protection: tube socks.
Video.title: "Key Largo"

Video.summary: We will take you on an incredible journey visiting the most iconic wrecks and reefs in this area of the Keys. And we will also explore the groundbreaking work that scientists and volunteers are working on to shade corals from the harsh sunlight and extreme ocean temperatures.
Video.title: "Islamorada"

Video.summary: We are in Marathon, the heart of the Florida Keys, where crystal-clear waters meet charming island vibes. Known for its pristine dive sites, rich marine life, and welcoming locals, Marathon offers some of the best underwater adventures in the world.
Video.title: "Marathon"

Video.summary: Experience the magic of shore diving from one of the Keysĺ most scenic beaches. The episode also follows military veterans discovering healing and renewed purpose through diving.
Video.title: "Lower Key - Big Pine Key"

Video.summary: Capt Brandon visits Quails Landing Plantation in South Georgia and his buddy Steven Redrick to do all things outdoors.
Video.title: "Quails Landing"

Video.summary: Brandon fishes with Robbie Crosnoe On Lake Henderson. These longtime buddies are dialed into the lake like no one else.
Video.title: "One-Two Punch"

Video.summary: Capt. Brandon Branch, Steve Grant and Kelly Player leave Jacksonville, FL for the Gulfstream to get into some Mahi.
Video.title: "Mahi Madness"

Video.summary: Brandon fishes an insane grouper bite with his good buddy from Sodium Fishing Gear.
Video.title: "Seabass"
